message:
feat(scripts): update training scripts and tasks

- Update base training, evaluation, and loss scripts
- Update chat RL and SFT scripts
- Update mid-training and parameter tuning scripts
- Update task definitions (ARC, GSM8K, HumanEval, MMLU, SmolTalk)
- Update engine tests
